title: Preparing for HTB CDSA 7-Day Practical Exam
description: Preparing for the Hack The Box Certified Defensive Security Analyst (HTB CDSA) 7-day practical exam to strengthen my expertise in defensive security and incident response.

title: Solved "PsExec Hunt" Lab by CyberDefenders
description: Analyzed SMB traffic and IDS alerts within a PCAP file to trace suspicious PsExec lateral movement, identifying compromised systems, exposed credentials, and targeted administrative shares.

title: Solved "Web Investigation" Lab by CyberDefenders
description: Analyzed network traces (PCAP) of a web application compromise to reconstruct the attacker's timeline and understand their exact steps within the network.
